Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Loreli]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Loreli was an original strategist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Loreli is a person who once said 'A forgotten man is invisible.'}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Loreli is a strategist and scholar from the ancient past who currently serves the Empire as a Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Loreli was a great strategist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Loreli is a companion of Jorin Maze-walker.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Loreli is someone the Regent had a bet with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Loreli is a Regent who met with the Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Loreli is a historical hero depicted in the Luminian cathedral.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Loreli joined the group after the Emperor began calling himself the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Loreli is on the other side of something (implied location) and had previously talked an assassin out of killing her.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Loreli is one of the individuals who will step down from rule as part of Estyr's deal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Loreli is reported to have snuck off to Izyria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Loreli is a strategist and an ally of Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Loreli is the founder of the Luminian Order and once struck Urg’naut down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Loreli's Intent is the direct opposite of Urg’naut's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Loreli is located on the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Loreli is the Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Loreli wears trademark silver-and-white armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Loreli can radiate an aura of peace and tranquility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Loreli has healing abilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Loreli is a Luminian Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Loreli has the ability to Read people and their possessions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Loreli falls from the sky sword-first.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Loreli was being levitated by Estyr.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — Loreli is a person the Emperor mentions who might still be alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Shera previously met with Loreli and Estyr in a conference room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Loreli left a message in her weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Loreli is a Regent who would be after the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Loreli was a ruler who delegated and appointed other rulers as a guide.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Loreli is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Loreli is the Regent of the West and first of the Luminian Order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Loreli is a woman who was called by Estyr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Loreli has dark skin and hair in a hundred braids.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Loreli is the original Pilgrim and the original Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Loreli is the Daughter of the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Loreli landed a fatal blow on the Great Elder during the Elder War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The group needs to hold the wheel until Loreli returns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera thought Loreli had joined the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Loreli's eyes can flash white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Loreli spent her time with the Luminians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Loreli uses a sword and produces lightning-bright bolts of pure white.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
